content: Which stock index in the Asia region has exhibited the highest average intraday volatility since 2020?

message.content: Which stock index in the Asia region has exhibited the highest average intraday volatility since 2020?

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, use Config tool.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) on a cron schedule or once at a specific time. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 вҶ’ 4.6, 4.6 вҶ’ 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

input.command: duckdb '/Users/shreyashankar/Documents/projects/DataAgentBench/query_stockindex/query_dataset/indextrade_query.db' "SELECT Index, AVG((High - Low) / NULLIF(Open, 0)) AS avg_intraday_vol, COUNT(*) AS n FROM index_trade WHERE Index IN ('N225','NSEI','399001.SZ','000001.SS','TWII','HSI') AND Date >= '2020-01-01' GROUP BY Index ORDER BY avg_intraday_vol DESC;"
input.description: Compute avg intraday volatility for Asian indices since 2020

input.command:
duckdb '/Users/shreyashankar/Documents/projects/DataAgentBench/query_stockindex/query_dataset/indextrade_query.db' "
WITH parsed AS (
  SELECT Index, High, Low, Open,
    COALESCE(
      TRY_STRPTIME(Date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'),
      TRY_STRPTIME(Date, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'),
      TRY_STRPTIME(Date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p')
    ) AS dt
  FROM index_trade
  WHERE Index IN ('N225','NSEI','399001.SZ','000001.SS','TWII','HSI')
)
SELECT Index,
  AVG((High - Low) / NULLIF(Open, 0)) AS avg_intraday_vol,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  MIN(dt) AS min_dt, MAX(dt) AS max_dt
FROM parsed
WHERE dt >= '2020-01-01'
GROUP BY Index
ORDER BY avg_intraday_vol DESC;
"
input.description: Parse dates and compute intraday volatility since 2020

content.text: The Shenzhen Composite Index (399001.SZ), tracking the Shenzhen Stock Exchange, has exhibited the highest average intraday volatility among Asian indices since 2020, with an average daily (High вҲ’ Low)/Open of roughly 1.83%.

lastPrompt: Which stock index in the Asia region has exhibited the highest average intraday volatility since 2020?
